_readme.description: Defines the automatic sanction applied to users who fail specific verification checks.
_readme.Alt_Detect: Sanction applied when a secondary/alternate account is detected.
_readme.Ip_Already_Linked: Sanction applied when the IP address is already linked to another account.
_readme.Vpn_Proxy_Detected: Sanction applied when a VPN or proxy connection is detected.
_readme.Bot_Detected: Sanction applied when the account is identified as a bot.
